Cash Forecast
Live · Where the runway goes from here · modeled from your ledger
This page is a projection, not a record.Every figure below is modeled forward from your actual ledger — it shows where today’s trajectory leads, not money that has moved. Drag the spend control to test a different future.
M
Finance AI · Cash Forecast
Modeled · 22 days actualLedger + recurringUpdated today 06:14
On current pace
Month-end cash projects to $214K
At the trajectory of the last 22 days you end May around $214K — comfortably above your $80K safety floor. No action needed to stay solvent.
Seasonal load
Q3 tax + peak-season buy land together
In the 6-month view, the August tax payment and the pre-peak inventory buy fall within two weeks of each other — the model's lowest point. Worth pre-funding.
Headroom
Spend could rise ~35% before the floor is at risk
The model says you can scale acquisition meaningfully and still clear the safety floor in all but the conservative case. The slider below shows exactly where it breaks.

At current spend the base case lands near $272K with a comfortable floor. The model says you have real headroom — but watch the conservative line, which is where a soft month would actually take you.
